zh.Nettlecombe, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin de Raleigh II於1191年出生在英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆時，他的父親Warin de Raleigh1歲，母親Mrs Warin de Raleigh22歲。他去世於1256年6月12日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆。

zh-hans.Nettlecombe, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特內特萊可姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warin de Raleigh II于1191年出生在英国薩默塞特內特萊可姆时，他的父亲Warin de Raleigh1岁，母亲Mrs Warin de Raleigh22岁。他去世于1256年6月12日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特內特萊可姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawleigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

variants.name: Riley
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Warin de Raleigh II was born in 1191, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, his father, Warin de Raleigh, was 1 and his mother, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, was 22. He died on 12 June 1256, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin de Raleigh II est né en 1191, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Warin de Raleigh, avait 1 ans et sa mère, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, avait 22 ans. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1256, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Warin de Raleigh II 1191 in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Warin de Raleigh 1 und seine Mutter Mrs Warin de Raleigh 22. Er starb am 12. Juni 1256 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Raleigh II è nato il nel 1191 nel Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Warin de Raleigh, aveva 1 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, aveva 22 anni. Morì il 12 giugno 1256, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Nettlecombe, Somerset, England.

ja.Nettlecombe, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトネットレコンベ
ja.lifeSummary: Warin de Raleigh IIが1191年にイギリスソメルセトネットレコンベで生まれた時，父Warin de Raleighは1歳，母Mrs Warin de Raleighは22歳であった。彼は1256年6月12日に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトネットレコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Warin de Raleigh II(이)가 1191년 영국 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Warin de Raleigh(은)는 1세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Warin de Raleigh(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1256년 6월 12일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 네틀렉브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Raleigh II nasceu em 1191, em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Warin de Raleigh, tinha 1 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, tinha 22 anos. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1256, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin de Raleigh II родился в 1191 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Warin de Raleigh было 1 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Warin de Raleigh, 22. Он умер 12 июня 1256 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Warin de Raleigh II nació en 1191, en Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Warin de Raleigh, tenía 1 años y su mamá, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, tenía 22 años. Murió el 12 de junio de 1256, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra.
